name: Time Warner Inc.
description: Time Warner Inc. was a prominent American multinational media and entertainment conglomerate headquartered in New York City. Formed in 1990 through the merger of Time Inc. and Warner Communications, the company operated as a major force in the industry, owning iconic brands such as HBO, CNN, and Warner Bros. It was publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange until its acquisition by AT&T in 2018, after which it was rebranded as WarnerMedia. The company played a pivotal role in shaping global media, film production, and television broadcasting throughout its existence.
